title: Videos of Bill Clinton, Hillary Clinton depositions on Epstein released: Watch
shortDescription: The House Oversight Committee released the videos of former President Bill Clinton and former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton's depositions. Watch them here.

title: In win for GOP, Supreme Court blocks NY map change before midterms
shortDescription: Republicans, including the Trump administration, asked the Supreme Court to intervene in a redistricting dispute in New York.

title: US death toll rises as Trump promises 'big wave' of attacks
shortDescription: As the war between the United States and Iran enters its third day, the death toll of American servicemen continues to climb, now reaching six deaths.

title: Trump’s second term seen through defining moments
shortDescription: Trump’s second term saw aggressive immigration and trade moves, federal downsizing, and assertive foreign interventions in Venezuela and Iran.

title: Trump appears have rash behind right ear
shortDescription: Videos and images show what appeared to be discoloration behind President Donald Trump’s right ear.

title: Newsom slams Trump's focus on ballroom amid military action in Iran
shortDescription: Gov. Gavin Newsom criticizes the President's decision to join Israel in striking Iran over the weekend resulting in the death of four service members.

title: 'Nothing boring about this': Trump sells the Iran cause in high-stakes war
shortDescription: He was remarkably relaxed, as though it was just another Monday. But at stake with the Iran war may be his presidency.

title: Images show rash on President Trump's neck. What is it?
shortDescription: President Donald Trump was photographed at a ceremony with discolored skin on his neck. Is it a shingles rash? The doctor said it is due to a cream.

title: Melania Trump leads UN Security Council meeting as US attacks Iran
shortDescription: See Melania Trump chair a United Nations Security Council meeting to discuss education's role in promoting peace as the United States attacks Iran.

title: What is Congress' role in strikes on Iran?
shortDescription: Only Congress has the ability to declare war, but presidents can use their authority or War Powers Act to engage in military action.

title: What is Trump's approval rating? Iran strikes controversial in polls
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has said the military operation in Iran may go on for several weeks. He is already unpopular. What is his approval rating?

title: Trump awards Medals of Honor amid US strikes on Iran
shortDescription: President Trump holds Medal of Honor ceremony for three U.S. Army Soldiers as international tensions rise following U.S. strikes on Iran.

title: Trump on Iran threat to US
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said the U.S. was "very nearly" under threat from Iran.

title: 'No aborts. Good luck,' Trump told troops before Iran attack
shortDescription: Hundreds of aircraft and thousands of servicemembers were involved in the war's launch, the Pentagon's top general said.

title: Was Trump labeled a war criminal? No, here is what UN leader said
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's military has attacked Iran, but he hasn't been labeled a war criminal by the UN security council, as a social posts suggests.
